series_metadata.series_description: This file contains the stubs of each renewal license issued annually. The stubs reveal the numbers of the licensees issued the licensee's name, adress, renewal date, and represents payment of the fee.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Machine readable records are to be maintained and updated on the AS 400 computer data base system, as long as stubs are being issued, then destroy by erasure ; Paper: Retain license stubs for 1 year after records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
